title: GlobalReactions
description: GlobalReactions: Total global reactions for a given Loadcase or LoadCombination.

FX.description: Total force in the global X-direction. Property has a quantity of type Force measured in [N].

FY.description: Total force in the global Y-direction. Property has a quantity of type Force measured in [N].

FZ.description: Total force in the global Z-direction. Property has a quantity of type Force measured in [N].

MX.description: Total moment about the global X-axis. Property has a quantity of type Moment measured in [N.m].

MY.description: Total moment about the global Y-axis. Property has a quantity of type Moment measured in [N.m].

MZ.description: Total moment about the global Z-axis. Property has a quantity of type Moment measured in [N.m].

ModeNumber.description: Positive index, starting at one. Only set for cases with modal outputs such as dynamic cases.

TimeStep.description: Time step for time history results.

_t.description: Optional Type disciminator for BHoM type.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional Version of BHoM used when generating the object.
